title: Grilled Chicken Skewers with Floral Salsa
description: Tender chicken skewers marinated in a zesty mixture of herbs and spices, grilled to perfection and served with a refreshing floral salsa.

ingredients.name: floral
ingredients.amount: 2 tablespoons, chopped fresh herbs (such as parsley or cilantro)

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together honey, floral, salt, black pepper, and lemon juice.
Add chicken to the marinade and mix to coat.
Thread chicken onto skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
Grill skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, prepare the floral salsa by combining chopped herbs with a squeeze of lemon juice.
Serve grilled skewers with floral salsa on the side.
